RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT OXO INTERNATIONAL LTD'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is taken under submission. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Paula Shi, CSR # 13358 =302/ehg

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT OXO INTERNATIONAL LTD.'s MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied. The complaint sufficiently alleges malicious conduct within the meaning of CC 3294(c)(1). Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-22-2014 Continued To Apr-20-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Pltf'S Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File 1st Amd Complt
Off Calendar Aug-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS KIMBERLY LANDIS and TORIN JONES' Motion For Leave To File 1st Amended Complaint is granted. Plaintiff has leave to file the amended complaint. The trial date is continued to April 20, 2015. The new trial date is the "initial trial date" for all purposes and all deadlines and cut off dates are based on the new trial date. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest J. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg

Ntc Of Pltf'S Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File 1st Amd Complt
Off Calendar Aug-15-2014 Continued To Aug-22-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS KIMBERLY LANDIS and TORIN JONES' Motion For Leave To File 1st Amended Complaint
is continued to August 22, 2014, to give the opposing party an opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of its opposition with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
